description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a pre-verify stage containing two jobs. The build-integration-image job extends .cached-job, .build-job and .rules:build-integration-image, has no dependencies, and runs the shell command ./support/docker ci-build-integration-image. The build-verify-image job extends .cached-job, .build-job and .rules:code-changes-verify, declares a need on the release-image job, and runs ./support/docker ci-build-verify-image. Both jobs inherit caching and rule logic from the extended templates and execute their Docker helper scripts in the pre-verify stage.
